notes: v1.14.142 - BLUE ICON REBRAND Stage 2 (header shield): the redesign header shield now renders the new blue phantom-shield-256.webp (was phantom-shield.png) at width 40 (was 28), and the shield button border is recolored to the SYS pill's cyan so the shield+SYS header pair reads as one unit. MECHANISM: the shield img (hdr-shield-img) is display:none in legacy and inline-block only under body.rd, so swapping its src/width changes ONLY the redesign view. The shield lives inside the SHARED #hdr-ghost-btn (in body.rd the ghost img is hidden and the shield shows), so the border is set via a NEW body.rd-scoped rule 'body.rd .hdr-ghost-btn:not(.alert){border-color:rgba(92,242,255,0.4)}' - legacy (no body.rd) keeps the violet base border untouched (byte-identical), and :not(.alert) preserves the gold identity-unset alert cue. NOTE: the handoff said the shield button border was gold; live OODA found it is actually the violet base rgba(155,89,255,0.28) (gold only appears in the .alert identity-unset state) - so this ADDS a cyan body.rd rule rather than changing a gold one; the cyan value rgba(92,242,255,0.4) matches the SYS pill's data-state=ok border exactly. Precache-first: icons/phantom-shield-256.webp added to sw.js PRECACHE_URLS (the old phantom-shield.png entry kept - still used by legacy). Three-stamp lockstep 141->142. Gates: node --check x3 + sw.js, CSS brace balance (+1 rule), version.json valid JSON, 0 lone-LF. Render-verified iPhone14. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved): close+reopen, confirm v1.14.142, header shows the new blue shield, its border now matches the SYS pill cyan (pair reads as one unit), tap still opens the overflow menu; airplane reload paints; ?legacy=1 = the old shield/ghost header unchanged (violet, png). TAP-TARGET note: shield button grows to ~50px tall with the 40px img - acceptable header utility button (was ~38px); flag if John wants padding bumped to >=56px. NEXT (await John, never chain): Stage 3 = Deploy>Tools 5 tools+blocker (->.143, supersedes parked C2), Stage 4 launcher (->.144 ==C4), Stage 5 SYS-pill EKG->webp (->.145 CONFIRM w/John - live status element), Stage 6 bake 0.85x cyan glow (->.146, supersedes parked C3). BOM tool tile PENDING. PRIOR v1.14.141 = blue Stage 1 (9 drop-in icons); .140 = C1 IEC tile.
